title: Password reset
oneLiner: Voice-guided tour for use case: Password reset

steps.label: Landing page ready
steps.observe: Home page is open. Auto voice tour begins — no blue-tag clicks needed.

steps.label: Open Forgot password
steps.observe: Enter login email; same success message for unknown emails (no enumeration).

steps.label: Submit reset request — manual
steps.observe: Check inbox for password_reset context mail (1-hour link).

steps.label: Complete reset on link — manual
steps.observe: Choose new password; sign in with updated credentials.
